name: Supercell
flavorHeadline: Ghost pepper + red fresno blend, black garlic umami depth
jarImageAlt: Jar of Tomato Warning Supercell EF-4 salsa with a dark crimson label
productStory: Rotation confirmed. A supercell is the rarest, most organized storm on the radar — a system that demands respect, not reaction. Ghost pepper dictates the terms here: relentless, building heat that strikes fast and holds on. Black garlic grounds it in deep, fermented umami — a savory darkness that makes the fire mean something. Red fresno peppers add a bright, sharp counterpoint. This is not casual heat. This is deliberate. 40,000 to 80,000 SHU.
pairings: Slow-smoked ribs with a dry rub
Dark chocolate and aged cheddar board
